title: Add parameter judgment for commands that do not require parameters

comments.body:
>Code LGTM but I am missing tests

@ripcurld Do we still need to perform a special test on this? Each command has a judgment on the number of input parameters. In this case, the parameters need to be tested for each command. I don't think it is necessary.
LGTM.  @ripculd I think the tests have been provided in another PR.  Are you OK with this PR?

:pushpin: Commit 7e17a54 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 7e17a5492d0c1cacfd2d920d10b04ae0d4900e0f -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
